brand_identity.name: AmbyoAI
brand_identity.emotional_tone: Clinical precision, hospital-grade trust, calm and reliable
rules: No purple or teal AI slop gradients. Strictly medical imaging palette.
Worker UI must be legible in outdoor/bright daylight (camp screening).
Test execution screens MUST be dark navy (#0A0F1C) for maximum camera contrast and tracking accuracy.
Children-facing elements should be friendly but strictly professional.
Confidentiality and trust are paramount; forms must feel secure and authoritative.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
scales.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl font-medium tracking-tight text-slate-900 dark:text-white
scales.label: text-sm font-semibold tracking-wide uppercase text-slate-500

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous medical spacing with strict geometric alignment. Use 8px grid.

DistancePill.description: Floating pill showing real-time distance using MediaPipe.
DistancePill.base_classes: fixed top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-semibold text-sm backdrop-blur-xl border shadow-lg z-50 transition-colors duration-300

RiskBadge.description: Small indicator badge for patient risk level.
RiskBadge.base_classes: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

UrgentBanner.classes: w-full bg-red-600 text-white p-4 flex items-start gap-4 rounded-xl shadow-lg border-l-4 border-red-900 animate-in slide-in-from-top fade-in duration-300

ScoreRing.description: SVG Circular progress showing health score.
ScoreRing.wrapper_classes: relative w-32 h-32 flex items-center justify-center
ScoreRing.text_classes: absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center font-mono text-3xl font-bold

TestProgressBar.description: 6-segment progress bar for the testing flow.
TestProgressBar.wrapper_classes: w-full flex gap-1 h-2 bg-slate-100 dark:bg-slate-800 rounded-full overflow-hidden

MicIndicator.classes: inline-flex items-center justify-center w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-blue-50 text-blue-600 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400

ConsentForm.container_classes: bg-white p-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm space-y-4
ConsentForm.toggle_row_classes: flex items-start justify-between gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors

LanguageSwitcher.classes: flex items-center gap-2 p-1 bg-slate-100 rounded-lg border border-slate-200
LanguageSwitcher.button_active: bg-white text-slate-900 shadow-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-sm transition-all
LanguageSwitcher.button_inactive: text-slate-500 font-medium px-3 py-1.5 text-sm hover:text-slate-700

PinLoginScreen.layout: 100vh flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-50 px-4

WorkerHome.layout: Header with Worker Name & Stats -> Main content with Patient Queue. Light theme.
elements: Summary Stats: Total Screened, Pending Referrals
Button: Register New Patient (Primary CTA, Large)
Screening Queue: List of PatientCards with Name, Age, RiskBadge

AddPatient.layout: Clean, linear form inside a max-w-2xl container. Light theme.
elements: Form Fields: Child Name, DOB, Guardian Name, Contact

TestRunnerShell.layout: Fixed viewport, Dark mode strictly enforced (#0A0F1C).
elements: Live camera feed PIP (Picture-in-Picture) minimal box at bottom left

TestScreens.VisualAcuity: Large, high-contrast LEA symbols or Tumbling E in center. 3-2-1 countdown overlay.
TestScreens.GazeDetection: 9-dot calibration pattern showing sequentially. High contrast white dots on dark navy.
TestScreens.Hirschberg: White flash simulator in center. Dark background.
TestScreens.RedReflex: Full white screen pulse for 2 seconds to capture pupil reflex, then returns to dark.

ResultsSummary.layout: Light theme. Grid layout for results.
elements: List of Findings (Card per test with normal/abnormal tags)

images.description: Young girl undergoing an eye examination. Use in WorkerHome banner or Add Patient intro.
Modern medical office interior. Use for PinLoginScreen background (heavily blurred or overlaid with white/slate-50).
Calm subtle gradient. Use for generic card backgrounds or loading screens.
